---
title: "My First Website"

---

## Hello!

My name is YOUR NAME.

I study YOUR DEGREE.

### Edit this sentence
I am interested in ...

### Further edit this site 
it's all just markdown!

This is a numbered list

1. first
2. second
3. third


```{python}
print("hello world!")
```

This is a new piece of text. clone the repo > code . to open on VS code
 > then change the text on index.qmd > push
